description: This file defines the AuthService class, which manages user authentication processes including registration, email verification, login attempts, and audit logging within the Spring Boot backend application.

classes.name: AuthService
classes.description: A Spring Service class handling user authentication, registration, email verification, login validation, and audit logging.

methods.name: registerUser
methods.description: Registers a new user with email and password, sends verification email, and logs the registration event.

methods.name: sendOrResendVerification
methods.description: Generates and sends (or resends) an email verification token, invalidating previous tokens.

methods.name: verifyToken
methods.description: Verifies an email token, activates the user, and logs verification success or failure.

methods.name: canLogin
methods.description: Checks if a user can successfully login based on email verification and password matching, logging each attempt.

methods.name: getUserByEmail
methods.description: Retrieves a user entity by email if it exists.
